title: sophora japonica var. pubescens
intro: Sophora japonica var. pubescens, also known as the Japanese sophora or hairy sophora, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Sophora japonica var. pubescens include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestive health and immune function.
